all.en: Last summer，my best friend and I decided to go backpacking through Southeast Asia for two months.
all.zh: 去年夏天，我最好的朋友和我決定到東南亞背包旅行兩個月。

all.en: We packed light and carried only the essentials in our large backpacks.
all.zh: 我們行李輕便，只在大背包裡裝了必需品。

all.en: Our journey began in Bangkok，where the busy night markets amazed us with their colors and smells.
all.zh: 我們的旅程從曼谷開始，那裡熱鬧的夜市以五彩繽紛的顏色和香味讓我們驚嘆。

all.en: We took overnight buses to save money on accommodation and to cover long distances.
all.zh: 我們搭乘夜間巴士來節省住宿費用，並能跨越長距離。

all.en: In Cambodia，we visited the ancient temples of Angkor Wat at sunrise.
all.zh: 在柬埔寨，我們在日出時參觀了古老的吳哥窟寺廟。

all.en: Meeting other backpackers from around the world was one of the highlights of our trip.
all.zh: 認識來自世界各地的背包客是我們旅程的亮點之一。

all.en: We shared travel tips，stories，and even meals at cheap hostels along the way.
all.zh: 沿途我們在便宜的青年旅館分享旅遊小撇步、故事，甚至一起吃飯。

all.en: Sometimes we got tired and missed home，but the adventure kept us going.
all.zh: 有時候我們會疲倦並想家，但冒險讓我們繼續前進。

all.en: We learned to communicate using simple words and lots of hand gestures.
all.zh: 我們學會用簡單的字彙和大量的手勢來溝通。

all.en: By the end of the trip，we had become more independent and confident travelers.
all.zh: 旅程結束時，我們已經成為更獨立、更有自信的旅行者。

all.en: After Cambodia, we crossed the border into Vietnam and explored the bustling city of Hanoi.
all.zh: 離開柬埔寨後，我們越過邊境進入越南，探索熱鬧的河內市。

all.en: We rented bicycles to ride around the old streets and ancient lakes at sunset.
all.zh: 我們租了腳踏車，在夕陽下繞著古老的街道和湖泊騎行。

all.en: In Laos, we relaxed at a riverside guesthouse for three peaceful days.
all.zh: 在寮國，我們在河邊的民宿放鬆了寧靜的三天。

all.en: A local family invited us to share dinner and taught us how to cook sticky rice.
all.zh: 一戶當地家庭邀請我們共進晚餐，並教我們如何煮糯米飯。

all.en: We continued by boat down the Mekong River, watching village life pass slowly by.
all.zh: 我們搭船順著湄公河而下，看著沿岸的村莊生活緩緩流過。

all.en: In Malaysia, we hiked through a rainforest and saw wild monkeys swinging through the trees.
all.zh: 在馬來西亞，我們穿越雨林健行，看到野生猴子在樹間擺盪。

all.en: My friend caught a mild stomach bug, so we rested at a small clinic for two days.
all.zh: 我朋友得了輕微的腸胃炎，所以我們在一間小診所休息了兩天。

all.en: The local doctor was incredibly kind and only charged us a tiny fee for the medicine.
all.zh: 當地醫生非常親切，藥費也只收我們一點點。

all.en: Our final stop was Bali, where we celebrated the end of our adventure with sunset surfing.
all.zh: 我們的最後一站是峇里島，我們以夕陽衝浪慶祝冒險的結束。

all.en: When we boarded the plane home, our backpacks were heavier with souvenirs and memories.
all.zh: 當我們搭上回家的飛機時，背包裡裝滿了紀念品和回憶，變得更重了。
